how_to_title: How to download Twitter/X videos with XSave?

how_to_step_2: Now, click on the share button and copy the video URL.
how_to_step_3: Open any web browser on your device, type xsave.app in the address bar, and press Enter to visit the site.
how_to_step_4: Paste the Twitter Video link into XSave and press the download button to fetch all available video qualities.
how_to_step_5: Tap on your preferred video quality to start the download.

about_p1: XSave was made for a simple reason: sometimes you find a video or GIF on Twitter/X that you don’t want to lose. Maybe it’s a funny meme, a news clip, or something you want to share later. With XSave, you can keep it with just a few clicks.
about_p2: We’ve kept it straightforward—no sign-ups, pop-ups, or software to install. Copy the tweet link, paste it into our site, and download the video in the quality you like.
about_p3: Behind the scenes, XSave uses trusted open-source tools to grab the video directly from Twitter/X. We don’t save your files, we don’t log what you download, and we don’t host any media on our servers.

privacy_intro: At XSave, accessible from xsave.app, one of our main priorities is the privacy of our visitors. This Privacy Policy document contains types of information that is collected and recorded by XSave and how we use it.
privacy_info_we_collect_p1: We do not require users to register for an account or provide any personal information to use our service. The only information we process is the Twitter/X URL that you submit in the input field. We do not store these URLs after the request is processed.
privacy_log_files_p1: XSave follows a standard procedure of using log files. These files log visitors when they visit websites. The information collected by log files include internet protocol (IP) addresses, browser type, date and time stamp, and referring/exit pages. These are not linked to any information that is personally identifiable. The purpose of the information is for analyzing trends, administering the site, and gathering demographic information for internal use to improve our service.
privacy_cookies_p1: Like any other website, XSave uses "cookies". These cookies are used to store information including visitors' preferences, such as language and theme settings. The information is used to optimize the users' experience by customizing our web page content based on visitors' browser type and/or other information.
privacy_third_party_p1: We do not use any third-party services that would collect personal data from our users. We may use analytics services that aggregate anonymous usage data.
privacy_your_rights_p1: Since we do not collect personal information, many of the standard data protection rights may not apply in the usual context. However, we are committed to user privacy. If you have any questions or concerns about your privacy while using our service, please contact us.
privacy_consent_p1: By using our website, you hereby consent to our Privacy Policy and agree to its terms.
